prospect_message:
Hi Piers,




Tom Salvat, our CEO, saw you are connected on LinkedIn and suggested I reach out as we are seeing a shift in how buyers research vendors.




Demand generation teams are being asked to drive more qualified pipeline while budgets and headcount remain tight.




elelem helps by turning your website into an Answer Engine that captures buyer questions, provides instant answers and improves onsite conversion from the traffic you already have.




We launch the Answer Engine in week 1, start capturing real buyer questions in week 2, and then optimise for AI search visibility from month 2.




Open to seeing how this could work on your site?




Regards,




Emma Pearson

elelem | elelem(.ai)

Speedwell Mill Old Coach Road, Tansley, Matlock, DE4 5FY

Just drop me a message to unsubscribe from further messages.
